description: Made of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment with a padded laptop holder with a velcro closureOne zipped pocket on the front One zippered compartment on the front with a mobile pouch, a zippered pocket, organiser pouches, a keyholder and a pouchPadded haul loop for easy carrying Two adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the back for breathable comfortBranded zips and branding applique on the front A zippered pocket at the base of the bag with a bag cover insideBack padding for comfortWarranty: 1 year
